Chair.title: Chair
Chair.description: Represents a barber chair and its live cash total for the day.

total.description: The current daily cash total of the chair.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last update.

history.description: The transaction history of the day.

SettingsPins.title: SettingsPins
SettingsPins.description: Represents the security configuration PINs for access control.

chairs/{chairId}.description: The collection of barber chairs tracking live revenue.

settings/{docId}.description: Global custom configurations such as password PINs.
